sources.title: Codex | AI Coding Partner from OpenAI
Using Codex with your ChatGPT plan

notes: Codex is positioned as a coding agent that can read, modify, and run code.
Codex can be used locally through CLI, IDE, or app, and delegated to cloud tasks.
Cloud tasks run in isolated environments and can work in parallel.
Effective usage depends on clear tasks, configured environments, tests, and review.
